tables: Test Feature Set Acquisition Control Classes and Functions Configuration Duty Cycle Measurement Classes Edge/Transition Time Measurement Functions Export Functions Fit Functions Serial Bit Analysis Functions and Classes
Defines the bit mask for the eye diagram.
In case of an bit mask error, holds the information for this error
Create an eye diagram for a message (or part of a message) or for a complete node.
Used to request the analysis data for a violation found with the eye diagram analysis
Used to check bits against a defined bit mask.
Performs Activate Trigger action for Scope Window.
Performs Connect Scope action for Scope Window.
Performs Deactivate Trigger action for Scope Window.
Performs Disconnect Scope action for Scope Window.
Performs Trigger Now action for Scope Window.
Detailed description of occurred scope event. Used together with the testGetWaitScopeEventData function.
Set the configuration for the scope device.
Get the scope devices and configuration names.
Retrieves the data of CANoe Scope event.
Waits for the occurrence of CANoe Scope event.
Defines the thresholds for the duty cycle measurement.
Used to request the duty cycle measurement data.
Used to request the duty cycle measurement violation data.
Can contain the information for e.g. slew rate, transition time, settling time for a bit.
Measures the transition time of rising and falling edges of a message within the defined area.
The defined frame cutout of the previously transition time measurement frame together with a bit mask is shown in the scope's Diagram view.
Measures different edge parameters for falling or rising edges of a frame or node.
Measures the transition time of rising and falling edges of a message within the defined area on bit level.
The defined frame cutout is shown in the scope's Diagram view. (CAN)
The defined frame cutout is shown in the scope's Diagram view. (FlexRay)
Contains information e.g. bit time, start time for a bit.
Defines the analyze range for a bit analysis.
Starts an analysis for the defined bit segments for each bit, which is within the defined range.
Gets the bit time of one bit if the field length measurement was used for a field range.
Measures the time of a field range or the bit time of one bit.
Checks the bits of a message against the defined bit mask.
Request the analysis data for a single bit.
After a signal was analyzed, the average values of the voltages of CAN_H, CAN_L, and CAN_Diff are calculated for a defined bit range.
Retrieve the data of the bit mask violations.
Gets specific bit values from a message.
Get specific data for a serial bit analysis.
If the serial bit analysis has found errors, the violations can be requested with this function.
Checks the bits of a message against the defined bit mask.
The defined frame cutout together with a previously defined bit mask is shown in the scope's Diagram view.
